comment: Manifest of green-registry blend candidates for the Track G3 green blend. Add a new source by appending ONE object to this list -- no code changes needed. See README.md 'Adding a new source' for the exact steps (registry_guard also needs a matching green_allowlist.json entry before optimize_blend.py will accept it).

sources.name: exp038_sigmafixed
sources.notes: current green champion. context_rows: 1, sigma_mode=fixed (no predicted-sigma head).

sources.name: exp040_metric
sources.notes: architecturally distinct 2nd model (metric_weight=0.6 tile-RMSE-shaped loss). Weaker solo but earmarked for blend diversity (Track G3).
